steps.title: Identify the structure needing a transition
steps.content: The first sentence presents one harm from nonrecyclable items—contamination. The second sentence presents another harm—machinery damage. Both support the thesis that wishcycling is harmful.

steps.title: Match the transition that signals addition
steps.content: ”Moreover” introduces another supporting point that reinforces the argument. The other three all fail to signal addition—”On the contrary” contradicts the parallel relationship, while “Fittingly” and “Nevertheless” don't convey simple addition. That matches choice C — C is correct.
